code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true

  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end

    if i % 2 == 0
      if first
        result = tok
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{tok}"
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
